description_long: This armchair features a high, wingback design with a gently curved backrest and prominent, rounded wings on either side. The upholstery is a solid lavender color, smooth and plush, covering both the seat and the armrests. The armrests are thick, padded, and seamlessly integrated into the chair's body, providing ample comfort. The seat cushion is broad and slightly raised, offering a generous sitting area. The legs are made of dark wood, elegantly curved in a cabriole style, adding a classic touch to the overall modern look. The back of the chair is fully upholstered, with no visible seams or decorative elements, maintaining a clean and cohesive appearance.
description: A high-backed, winged armchair upholstered in smooth lavender fabric with thick padded armrests and curved dark wooden legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, padded armrest and the elegant curve of the dark wooden front and back legs.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide seat, high winged backrest, and symmetrical padded armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and leg design, emphasizing the chair's plush profile.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the fully upholstered, rounded back with no visible seams or decorations.
attribute_armrest_design: padded and upholstered, thick and rounded
attribute_backrest_style: high and winged, rounded top, fully upholstered
attribute_leg_type: curved wooden cabriole legs, dark finish
